shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only shot establishing scene; Shen enters with notice, foreground focuses on her; no dialogue or props inherited.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 你好，我是行政部新入职的——

shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue to front desk; visible: Shen and front desk; no props.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_FRONT_DESK
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 沈念歌是吧？行政部在三十二楼。这个电梯是专用电梯，你坐那边——她指了指角落里一部普通的员工电梯。

shots.reasoning_brief: Front desk speaks to Shen, points to elevator; visible both; action is pointing, no targets.
Shen responds calmly; foreground Shen; listener front desk.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHOU_YALIN_MANAGER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 你就是新来的沈念歌？名牌大学毕业？来当文员？

shots.reasoning_brief: Scene shift to 32F, Zhou addresses Shen; visible both; no props.
Shen greets Zhou smiling; visible both.
Shen agrees; foreground Shen; scene still continuous.

narration_lines: 她刻意绕开了那部电梯的方向。
但命运的安排从来不看人绕不绕路。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual narration of Shen avoiding elevator; no dialogue; continuous scene but no prop handoff.
Shen thanks Lu steadily after picking files; visible both; no prop id from previous.
Lu calls out to Shen; visible both.
Lu questions Shen after looking; visible both.
Shen introduces self lowly; visible both.
Lu dismisses coldly; visible both; continuous.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪～我今天在幼儿园画了一幅画！老师说我是全班画得最好的！等我回来给你看哦！你加油工作！爱你！

shots.reasoning_brief: Voice message from child to Shen; visible child (audio visual); prop CHILD_DRAWING_01 detected but no handoff.
Shen responds to phone; inherits smartphone from context; no drawing handoff.

narration_lines: 屏幕上是一份简报： 「沈念歌，26岁，滨海大学商学院毕业（全额奖学金）。四年前的毕业去向：不明。一个月前在滨海市租房入住。有一个四岁半的儿子，目前在星辉国际幼儿园就读。」
shots.reasoning_brief: Screen close-up, no characters visible; narration is document text; scene change, no prop inherit.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我说了，查。但我不喜欢被人发现自己在对什么感兴趣。低调。

shots.reasoning_brief: Lu instructs Zhao calmly; visible both; continuous office scene.

music_cues: 低沉的大提琴，一个长音，悬而未决
narration_lines: 他重新打开电脑，继续处理文件。
但电脑屏幕的角落，还留着那份关于沈念歌的简报。他始终没有关掉它。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual of Lu at desk with open report; music cue as emotion; narration descriptive; prop DOCUMENT_01 detected but no prior id for handoff.
